2021 में हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से नीचे दर्ज गर्भवती महिलाओं की सर्वाधिक संख्या वाले अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह के शीर्ष 5 उप-जिलों की पहचान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fmrt.pregnancy_women_hb_level_less_11) AS total_women_hb_less_11
FROM fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fmrt.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_women_hb_less_11 DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fmrt.pregnancy_women_hb_level_less_11) AS total_women_hb_less_11
FROM fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fmrt.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_women_hb_less_11 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह के उप-जिलों को वर्ष 2021 के लिए प्रारंभिक प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल पंजीकरण के उनके प्रतिशत के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) * 100.0 / SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) AS EARLY_REGISTRATION_PERCENTAGE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 0 ORDER BY EARLY_REGISTRATION_PERCENTAGE DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dg.sub_district,
    (SUM(fmrt.anc_registered_within_1st_trimester) / NULLIF(SUM(fmrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc), 0)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt ON dg.geography_id = fmrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY percentage DESC;
raw_output:

    dg.sub_district,
    (SUM(fmrt.anc_registered_within_1st_trimester) / NULLIF(SUM(fmrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc), 0)) * 100 AS percentage

JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt ON dg.geography_id = fmrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY percentage DESC;
